title: Sophisticated wolves
description: This mod aims to improve wolves in the games through a series of gameplay tweaks, AI improvements, and added features.
body:
What is Sophisticated Wolves? It's a mod that aims to improve wolves in the games through a series of gameplay tweaks, AI improvements, and added features. The focus is not to have overpowered items or crazy abilities, but rather balanced additions that make sense in the world of MC. Essentially, wolves should be able to better respond to your actions and take care of themselves, so you don't have to consider them a liability when mining, exploring or fighting.


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5RDQ4MjQynU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Features
Smarter Wolves

Wolves are no longer passive followers.
They are able to react to situations and take care of themselves much better than vanilla wolves.

Improved wolf AI and behaviour
Wolves react to dangers and environmental hazards
Smarter movement and pathfinding
Wolves are less likely to get stuck or lost
Improved survivability during exploration and combat
Training and Commands

Your wolf can be trained and controlled much more precisely.

Teach wolves new commands using bones
Configure attack targets and combat behaviour
Order wolves to guard an area
Call your wolves using a whistle
Make wolves stay, follow, or stop their current actions
Better Survival

Wolves are able to survive much longer without constant player babysitting.

Wolves can heal and recover more reliably
Automatic feeding options
Wolves can escape dangerous situations
Protection from accidental damage by their owner
Utility Items

The mod introduces several items designed to improve interaction with your pets.

Examples include:

Dog Treat – upgrades a wolf into a smarter and more capable companion
Dog Tag – allows giving wolves proper names
Whistle – quickly call your wolves from a distance
Pet Carrier – safely transport animals without them getting lost
Dog House – create a home for your wolves
Quality of Life Improvements

Many small improvements make traveling with wolves much more convenient.

Wolves avoid dangerous blocks and hazards
Wolves no longer push each other around
Improved interaction with the player
Configurable behavior options


Visit [official site](https://sophisticated-wolves.nightkosh.com/?page=about) or [minecraft forum](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1288717-sophisticated-wolves) for more information.
